p.seg: To all sons of Holy Mother Church present and future who shall view or hear these letters Adam of Heiton and Helen his wife send greeting in the Lord.

Your whole community should know that we have pledged our faith and sworn on holy relics in front of Master Hugh the archdeacon of Glasgow and Master Walter the dean of Tweeddale and the lord Adam of Bathgate and many other distinguished men, clerk and lay, that we shall never move a plaint against the monastic house of Melrose about the lands that we sold to the same house; nor shall we give willing consent to move a plaint against the same house about the aforesaid lands.

For the greater security of this matter we have verified this writing by the application of the seals of the aforesaid archdeacon and the aforesaid dean and the lord Adam of Bathgate together with the application of our own seal.
